summary: Fixed 5 bugs in swarm pipeline: 1) dispatch-task.sh syncs task_state.status on dispatch, 2) done-marker.sh updates task metadata to verifying, 3) watchdog.js checks both status fields + auto-corrects + 10min timeout, 4) orchestrator-bridge.js syncs task_state in all onAgentDone paths, 5) task-api.js filters phantom undefined tasks
